rulings.Case Title: GOOD GRANT 239, LLC VS. GEORGE FALCON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Enforce Terms Of Settlement Agreement In Unlawful Detainer And Amend Judgment To Include Holdover Damages And Additional Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 21, 2018, Line 3. PLAINTIFF GOOD GRANT 239, LLC'S Motion To Enforce Terms Of Settlement Agreement In Unlawful Detainer And Amend Judgment To Include Holdover Damages And Additional Attorney Fees. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to the request for additional holdover damages. Plaintiff failed to cite any term of the settlement agreement that provides for such recover. The only terms cited were 3(f) and 3(c). Additionally, the enforcement paragraph, 2, does not provide for such recovery in addition to $45,000. Motion is GRANTED as to the request for attorney's fees incurred in opposing the noticed stay request in the amount $1,050.
